chunks.title: Introduction to the Vision
chunks.reason: Establishes the time, place, and commission for the prophet.

chunks.title: Measurements of the East Gate
chunks.reason: Detailed architectural survey of the eastern entrance and its features.

chunks.title: Outer Court and North Gate
chunks.reason: Describes the outer court chambers and the dimensions of the north gate.

chunks.title: South and East Gates
chunks.reason: Continues the architectural survey with measurements for the south and east gates.

chunks.title: Chambers and Tables in the Gates
chunks.reason: Details the functional rooms for slaughtering sacrifices and chambers for priests.

chunks.title: Inner Court and Porch of the House
chunks.reason: Concludes with measurements of the inner court, altar, and the house porch.
